---
title: "<i>Net Cast in Many Waters: Sketches from the Lives of Missionaries, The</i>"
---

## <i>Net Cast in Many Waters: Sketches from the Lives of Missionaries, The</i>

**Type:** periodical

### About

This periodical, which was founded in 1866 and continued after 1897 as <i>The Net: The Monthly Magazine of the Zululand Missionary Association</i>, was originally edited by CMY’s great friend Anne Mackenzie.

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
